name: Forgot To POO
short_description: A dog that forgot to poo trying to poo at it's favorite poo place.
detailed_description:
About This Game

A casual, quirky platformer about a dog on a very personal mission.

You're a dog. You have a goal. It’s not saving the world — it’s finding your favorite poo spot.
Leap, dodge, and bark your way through a series of chaotic and funny challenges to reach the sacred destination where you can finally do your business in peace.

This is a light-hearted platformer with simple controls, strange enemies, and a surprising amount of determination.

Key Features:

  • 🐶 Play as a determined dog on a mission to reach the ultimate poo spot.

  • 🎮 Classic 2D platformer gameplay – Run, jump, and dodge your way through tricky stages.

  • 😼 Weird and wacky enemies – Avoid:

    • Cheese-shooting cats

    • Pushy birds

    • soju bottles

    • Slippery ice blocks

    • moving platforms and more!

  • 🍗 Power-up items to help on your journey:

    • Chicken Wings – Gain the ability to multi-jump

    • Water – Launch into a powerful super jump

  • 💩 Reach your final goal — your favorite place to poop — and bask in your hard-earned glory.

Whether you're playing for the laughs or the platforming, this silly little journey will leave a lasting impression.
